<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AGMS-Architecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-1044" dy="-402" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2100" pageHeight="1620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#0c2a20;" value="AGMS — Adaptive (Power) Grid Management System — Architecture & Interconnection (six-patent family)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="1500" x="40" y="8" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5c6b7a;" value="Solid = data-object flow (perceive → reason → command → execute)
Red dashed = feedback / resupply loops
Grey dashed = cross-cutting influence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="1620" y="6" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gwm" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2fb;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a3a5c;verticalAlign=top;" value="GridWideMind (GWM) — PERCEPTION & INTELLIGENCE (200 / 310) • “What is happening, and what has happened like it before?”" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1540" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ace" parent="gwm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Alert Correlation Engine (201)
collapses alert storms → one structured event" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="20" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gdss" parent="gwm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Grid-Wide Decision Support (202)
ML recommendation + confidence degree" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="320" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="le" parent="gwm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;" value="Learning Engine (203)
institutional memory • pattern recognition
“we’ve seen this before”" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="270" x="620" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="se" parent="gwm" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Simulation Engine (204)
“try it before you do it”" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="270" x="910" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ctx" parent="gwm" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;" value="Context Data (205)
labeled feature store" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="300" x="1210" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ga" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#eef7f1;strokeColor=#82b366;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#13433a;verticalAlign=top;" value="GridArtificer (GA) — REASONING & DECISION (210 / 315 / 960) • builds the Contextual & Cognitive State Machine (CaCSM): draft → simulate → calibrate → promote" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="250" width="1540" x="40" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gap" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Context Construct Engine (210)
GA-Parser → context meta-objects" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="220" x="20" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caps" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Contextual Abstraction
Panels (CAPs)
ranked by relevancy index" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="220" x="270" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="csmb" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="CSM Builder (214)
match historical pattern" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="180" x="520" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pcacsm" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Provisional CaCSM
(draft state machine)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="170" x="730" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prodcacsm" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Production CaCSM
(promoted, executable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="170" x="930" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="csmop" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="CSM Operator (213 / 1040)
runs the state machine,
fires the formation pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="190" x="1130" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gk" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="ga-GateKeeper
validates
ga-authenticationkey" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="170" x="1350" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gasim" parent="ga" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff8e6;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=2;dashed=1;" value="Simulate & calibrate every state (via Simulation Engine 204) — simulate-before-commit gate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="370" x="730" y="155" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gwch" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#fff5ea;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a4f00;verticalAlign=top;" value="GridWideCommandHub (GWCH) — ORCHESTRATION & EXECUTION (230 / 340 / 975) • the formation pipeline: one assembly line turning an abstract CaCSM into running software" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="1540" x="40" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gfc" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;" value="Grid-Wide Federation Command (975) — issues marching orders to the logistics corps" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="520" x="510" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="log" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="① Logistician (1023A)
WHICH assets → procure
• match federation command template
• select classes/assets by real-time status
• acquisition agent (1280) • auditor (1278)
• standing owner of unmet needs" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="280" x="20" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apm" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="② Asset Portfolio Manager (1300)
VERIFY fitness — ORACS indexes
• Observability • Reachability
• Adaptability • Controllability
• Security (+ Sustainability, Stability = 7)
health (1310) / perf (1315) analytics" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="280" x="320" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="olf" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#2d7a3a;strokeWidth=3;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;fontStyle=1;" value="③ Operation Loop Formation (1400)
★ GRANTED US 12,596,341 B2 (GE Vernova)
ASSEMBLE + SIMULATE the ORACS loop
• retrieve matching schema = DNA
• build per-asset meta objects
• interdependency / critical asset
• simulate loop before commit (claim 3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="300" x="620" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sc" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="④ Scout Command (1230)
DEPLOY the software agents
(expanded in the layer below)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="270" x="940" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fetm" parent="gwch" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Federated Edge
Transaction Manager (240 / 437)
authority transfer across cells
as a federated transaction
(integrity-preserving handoff)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="290" x="1230" y="175" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="scoutpipe" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#eaf2fb;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a3a5c;verticalAlign=top;" value="Scout Command pipeline (1230) — DEPLOY: stand up role-typed software agents on field hardware" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="1540" x="40" y="1090" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="liaison" parent="scoutpipe" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Scout Command Liaison (1441)
receives OC-meta-object,
kicks off scout formation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="340" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sfp" parent="scoutpipe" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Scout Formation Processor (1444)
parse host + inter-cell DNA maps
to drive incubation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="340" x="400" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="incub" parent="scoutpipe" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#2d7a3a;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;" value="Scout Incubator Manager (1445)
reconcile desired-vs-actual roles
assign idle • clone busy • incubate new
DNA.role = s_c, s_m, s_i, s_g" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="340" x="780" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="slm" parent="scoutpipe" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Scout Launch Manager (1447)
build launch plan per scout:
time, load, origin, destination, asset-id" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="360" x="1160" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cells" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f3eef7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#4a2d66;verticalAlign=top;" value="Operating Cells — Field Agent Devices (FADs) running Scouts • “Execute autonomously — even with no WAN”" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="1540" x="40" y="1300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="coord" parent="cells" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" value="Coordinator (s_c)
cell authority — manages cell & mission" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="350" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg" parent="cells" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Messenger (s_m)
data in motion — ingest, transform, comms" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="350" x="400" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="insp" parent="cells" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="Inspector (s_i)
observes cell — feeds decision support" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="350" x="780" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="guard" parent="cells" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Guard (s_g)
defends vs cyber / physical threats" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="360" x="1160" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cellnote" parent="cells" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;align=left;spacingLeft=10;fontColor=#333333;" value="Scout lifecycle: receive → verify (auth key) → execute role → detect trigger → { task | communicate | clone | terminate } • Self-forming & self-terminating cells • ISLAND MODE: runs hours/days with no WAN • Self-forming federations under a scout-master • clone / transfer-authority to scale & heal" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="1500" x="20" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xcut" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#fbfbfb;strokeColor=#888888;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;verticalAlign=top;dashed=1;" value="Cross-Cutting Systems — threads woven through every layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1490" width="380" x="1620" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xle" parent="xcut" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Learning Engine — the spine
retrieval & adaptation from history:
ranks CAPs • matches CaCSM patterns
• matches DNA schemas • picks POV
patterns • recalibrates states live" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="340" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xsim" parent="xcut" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Simulate-before-commit — a law
CaCSM promotion (GA) • operation
loop formation [granted claim 3]
• ORACS verification simulation.
Never actuate on an unvalidated plan." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="340" x="20" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xdata" parent="xcut" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Data Management / POV files
sole interface to the asset DB — no
module touches raw data. Role-filtered
views via patterns DB + Learning Engine:
• viewConstructModule (observe)
• controlConstructModule (actuate)
• adminConstructModule (coordinate)
GridWideEye builds PoV frames." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="340" x="20" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xsec" parent="xcut" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Security in the protocol
every inter-module message carries a
ga-authenticationkey, validated by a
ga-GateKeeper before any state machine
activates or data is released.
gAVA standardizes the message schema
so all modules speak one language." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="340" x="20" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xfed" parent="xcut" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3eef7;strokeColor=#9673a6;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=6;" value="Federation & autonomy spectrum (oft)
ioc.cc independent, supports central cmd
ioc.sc fully autonomous cell
ioc.coc member of cooperating neighbors
ioc.fm sub-federation member
Cells merge / federate under a scout-master." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="340" x="20" y="910" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ace" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#23445d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontColor=#23445d;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="gap" value="action stress frame

sole interface to the asset DB — no
module touches raw data. Role-filtered
views via patterns DB + Learning Engine:
• viewConstructModule (observe)
• controlConstructModule (actuate)
• adminConstructModule (coordinate)
GridWideEye builds PoV frames.

div.div:
Security in the protocol
every inter-module message carries a
ga-authenticationkey, validated by a
ga-GateKeeper before any state machine
activates or data is released.
gAVA standardizes the message schema
so all modules speak one language.
